# seo-setup

> Agent skill: give it a site URL and it completes the SEO groundwork —
> search engine registration (Google/Naver/Bing/Daum/Pinterest), GA4/GTM/
> Clarity measurement, local SEO (GBP/Naver Place/Kakao/Yelp), and paid ads
> via the Zernio Ads API. Checklist gates with real UI paths and pitfalls.

For agents that cannot `git clone`: read the files below via raw URLs, in this
order. Adopt SKILL.md's gates and hard rules as binding.

## Entry point

- [SKILL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/seo-setup/main/SKILL.md): gates G0-G4, hard rules — read FIRST
- [BOOTSTRAP.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/seo-setup/main/BOOTSTRAP.md): session prompt for harness-less agents

## References (read at the gate that names them)

- [references/ENGINES.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/seo-setup/main/references/ENGINES.md): search engine registration x5 — GSC URL-prefix rule, Naver, Bing GSC-import, Daum PIN in robots.txt, Pinterest RSS pins
- [references/MEASUREMENT.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/seo-setup/main/references/MEASUREMENT.md): GA4 + GTM + Clarity — retention 14mo, internal-traffic filter activation, generate_lead conversions, UTM rules, Ads/GSC links, audiences, AI Search channel regex, copy-paste AI delegation prompts
- [references/LOCAL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/seo-setup/main/references/LOCAL.md): local SEO — reviews as ranking data (GBP), Naver Place representative keywords, Kakao Maps, Yelp
- [references/PAID-ADS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/seo-setup/main/references/PAID-ADS.md): Zernio Ads API — boost post, standalone campaigns, audiences, analytics, spend safety rules (user-gated budgets)

## Credits

Distilled from the free AIMS Growth Playbook 2026 (aim-squad.com); some tips
originally from threads @avcd.eee and @place_joe. Zernio Ads API verified
against zernio.com public docs on 2026-07-16.
